steps.title: Find the sentence boundary
steps.content: The first clause says the relationship was the focus of a 1992 study in the Netherlands. The next clause says the study examined arthropod specimens. These are separate independent clauses and need a clear boundary.

steps.title: Reject run-on options
steps.content: Choice A joins the clauses with and led, making the structure awkward and unclear. Choice B leaves a comma splice. Choice D creates the incorrect phrase Netherlands led by without a boundary after the country name. The answer is C.
